title: Anchor join reports which field the path came from
action: Per P2, a destination row must say whether its path is the pane's live directory or its process start directory, and that fact is only knowable inside the anchor join. Add a provenance-carrying sibling to Snapshot::anchor_cwd_for_workspace (src/herdr/wire.rs:242) returning both the path and whether it came from foreground_cwd (live) rather than the cwd fallback. Reimplement anchor_cwd_for_workspace in terms of the new one so exactly one copy of the four-hop join exists; its signature and observable behavior must not change, because slice 1's tests assert them. Every join miss still degrades to None -- never a panic, never a substitute pane. Name the new tests with the prefix provenance_.

truths: Exactly one implementation of the workspace -> active_tab_id -> layout -> focused_pane_id -> pane walk exists in the file
The live flag is true only when the pane's foreground_cwd was present
A pane with only cwd yields that path with the live flag false
A pane with neither field, an absent layout, an absent active_tab_id, and an unknown workspace_id each yield None
Provenance resolves for a workspace that is not the globally focused one
Every pre-existing wire test stays green
artifacts: A provenance-carrying anchor accessor on Snapshot
anchor_cwd_for_workspace delegating to it, unchanged in signature
At least 5 tests prefixed provenance_, all passing
key_links: src/herdr/wire.rs:242-255 -- the join and the foreground_cwd-over-cwd precedence
src/herdr/wire.rs:139-142 -- foreground_cwd is unix-only and None elsewhere
prohibitions: Do not change anchor_cwd_for_workspace's signature or observable behavior
Do not touch any file outside src/herdr/wire.rs
Do not add a cfg(windows) or cfg(unix) branch -- provenance is data, not a platform fork (P8)

verify: cargo test --quiet && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --lib -- provenance_ 2>&1 | grep -qE 'test result: ok\. ([5-9]|[1-9][0-9]+) passed'

trace.outcome: Added Snapshot::anchor_for_workspace returning AnchorCwd{path, live}, provenance-flagging whether the anchor path came from foreground_cwd (live) vs the cwd fallback. anchor_cwd_for_workspace now delegates to it, unchanged signature/behavior. 8 new provenance_-prefixed tests cover live-true, live-false, all four join-miss cases, a non-focused workspace, and delegation equivalence.
trace.verify_output: cargo test: 226 passed, 0 failed. cargo fmt --all --check: clean. cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean. cargo test --lib -- provenance_: 8 passed, 0 failed (provenance_true_when_foreground_cwd_present, provenance_false_when_only_cwd_present, provenance_none_when_pane_missing_both_cwds, provenance_none_when_layouts_absent, provenance_none_when_active_tab_has_no_layout_entry, provenance_none_when_workspace_id_unknown, provenance_resolves_for_non_focused_workspace, provenance_anchor_cwd_for_workspace_delegates). Full chain exit code 0.
trace.verify_command: cargo test --quiet && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --lib -- provenance_ 2>&1 | grep -qE 'test result: ok\. ([5-9]|[1-9][0-9]+) passed'
